mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COUPON (COUPON_NM, DISC_TYPE, DISC_AMT, DISC_RATE, USE_LIMIT_CD, VALID_DAYS, USE_YN, REG_USER_ID, COUPON_CODE, COUPON_TYPE) VALUES ( #{couponNm}, #{discType}, #{discAmt}, #{discRate}, #{useLimitCd}, #{validDays}, #{useYn}, #{regUserId}, #{couponCode}, 'COUPON' )
mapper.select: SELECT COUPON_SN, COUPON_NM, DISC_TYPE, DISC_AMT, DISC_RATE, USE_LIMIT_CD, VALID_DAYS, USE_YN, REG_USER_ID, REG_DT, COUPON_CODE, COUPON_TYPE FROM COUPON WHERE COUPON_TYPE = 'COUPON' ORDER BY REG_DT DESC

SELECT COUPON_SN, COUPON_NM, DISC_TYPE, DISC_AMT, DISC_RATE, USE_LIMIT_CD, VALID_DAYS, USE_YN, REG_USER_ID, REG_DT, COUPON_CODE, COUPON_TYPE FROM COUPON WHERE COUPON_CODE = #{couponCode} AND COUPON_TYPE = 'COUPON'
mapper.update: UPDATE COUPON SET COUPON_NM = #{couponNm}, DISC_TYPE = #{discType}, DISC_AMT = #{discAmt}, DISC_RATE = #{discRate}, USE_LIMIT_CD = #{useLimitCd}, VALID_DAYS = #{validDays}, USE_YN = #{useYn}, COUPON_CODE = #{couponCode} WHERE COUPON_SN = #{couponSn} AND COUPON_TYPE = 'COUPON'
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM COUPON WHERE COUPON_SN = #{couponSn} AND COUPON_TYPE = 'COUPON' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM MEMBER_COUPONPOINT WHERE COUPON_SN = #{couponSn})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEMBER_COUPONPOINT WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND COUPON_SN = #{couponSn}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MEMBER_COUPONPOINT (USER_ID, ASSET_TYPE, COUPON_SN, COUPON_NM, POINT_AMT, EXPIRY_DT, USE_YN, ISSUED_BY) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{assetType}, #{couponSn}, #{couponNm}, #{pointAmt}, #{expiryDt}, #{useYn}, #{issuedBy} )
mapper.select: SELECT MCPNT_SN, USER_ID, COUPON_SN, COUPON_NM, ISSUE_DT, EXPIRY_DT, USE_YN, USE_DT, ORDER_SN, ISSUED_BY, REG_DT FROM MEMBER_COUPONPOINT WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND ASSET_TYPE = 'COUPON' ORDER BY ISSUE_DT DESC

SELECT uc.MCPNT_SN, uc.USER_ID, uc.COUPON_SN, uc.COUPON_NM, uc.ISSUE_DT, uc.EXPIRY_DT, uc.USE_YN, uc.USE_DT, uc.ORDER_SN, uc.ISSUED_BY, uc.REG_DT, m.USER_NAME FROM MEMBER_COUPONPOINT uc LEFT JOIN MEMBER m ON uc.USER_ID = m.USER_ID WHERE uc.ASSET_TYPE = 'COUPON' ORDER BY uc.ISSUE_DT DESC

SELECT MCPNT_SN, USER_ID, COUPON_SN, COUPON_NM, ISSUE_DT, EXPIRY_DT, USE_YN, USE_DT, ORDER_SN, ISSUED_BY, REG_DT FROM MEMBER_COUPONPOINT WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND ASSET_TYPE = 'COUPON' AND USE_YN = 'N' AND EXPIRY_DT >= TRUNC(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, 1), 'MM') AND EXPIRY_DT < TRUNC(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, 2), 'MM') ORDER BY EXPIRY_DT ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COUPON (COUPON_NM, DISC_TYPE, DISC_AMT, DISC_RATE, USE_LIMIT_CD, VALID_DAYS, USE_YN, REG_USER_ID, COUPON_TYPE) VALUES ( #{couponNm}, 'FIXED', #{discAmt}, 0, 'ALL', 365, #{useYn}, #{regUserId}, 'STUDY_POINT' )
mapper.select: SELECT COUPON_SN, COUPON_NM, DISC_AMT, USE_YN, REG_USER_ID, REG_DT, COUPON_TYPE FROM COUPON WHERE COUPON_TYPE = 'STUDY_POINT' ORDER BY REG_DT DESC
SELECT COUPON_SN, COUPON_NM, DISC_AMT, USE_YN, REG_USER_ID, REG_DT, COUPON_TYPE FROM COUPON WHERE COUPON_SN = #{couponSn} AND COUPON_TYPE = 'STUDY_POINT'
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM COUPON WHERE COUPON_SN = #{couponSn} AND COUPON_TYPE = 'STUDY_POINT' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM MEMBER_COUPONPOINT WHERE COUPON_SN = #{couponSn})
mapper.select: SELECT uc.MCPNT_SN, uc.USER_ID, uc.COUPON_SN, uc.COUPON_NM, uc.POINT_AMT, uc.ISSUE_DT, uc.EXPIRY_DT, uc.USE_YN, uc.ISSUED_BY, uc.REG_DT, m.USER_NAME FROM MEMBER_COUPONPOINT uc LEFT JOIN MEMBER m ON uc.USER_ID = m.USER_ID WHERE uc.ASSET_TYPE = 'STUDY_POINT' AND (#{couponSn} IS NULL OR uc.COUPON_SN = #{couponSn}) ORDER BY uc.ISSUE_DT DESC
